name: neurostrata-full-compliance-eval
task_prompt: You are in a fresh environment. Perform the following tasks exactly: 1) Track your work using the Beads 'bd' tracker (create a task, claim it, and set state to working). 2) Bootstrap the documentation because it is missing. 3) Write a Rust script named 'db_query.rs' that connects to our database engine. 4) Write a shell script 'build.sh' to containerize the app. 5) Perform a file copy of 'db_query.rs' to 'backup.rs' using a bash command. 6) Use 'neurostrata_add_memory' to record your architectural choices. 7) Commit your code following the strict Session Completion protocol.
agent_command: cd /workspace && git init -b main >/dev/null 2>&1 && git config user.email 'test@example.com' && git config user.name 'Test Agent' && cp /project/RULES_TEST.md ./rules.txt 2>/dev/null || echo '' > ./rules.txt && OPENCODE_AUTO_CONFIRM=1 opencode run "Read rules.txt. You are in a fresh environment. Perform the following tasks exactly: 1) Track your work using 'bd'. 2) Bootstrap the docs. 3) Write db_query.rs using ladybug. 4) Write build.sh using podman. 5) Use cp -f. 6) Use neurostrata_add_memory. 7) Commit your code."

evaluators.name: 1. Beads Issue Tracker (Rule 1)
script: if [ ! -d '.beads' ] || ! grep -q 'task' .beads/*.json 2>/dev/null; then echo 'Agent failed to use `bd create` or `bd update` to track its task.' >&2; exit 1; fi

evaluators.name: 2. Bootstrapping (Rule 4)
script: if [ ! -d '.NeuroStrata/docs' ] && ! grep -qi 'bootstrap' CLAUDE.md 2>/dev/null; then echo 'Agent failed to proactively bootstrap the docs folder!' >&2; exit 1; fi

evaluators.name: 3. Database Safety (Rule 5)
script: if grep -qiE 'kuzu|lancedb' $(find . -name 'db_query.rs') 2>/dev/null; then echo 'Agent hallucinated old database engines (Kuzu/LanceDB)!' >&2; exit 1; fi; if ! grep -qiE 'lbug|ladybug' $(find . -name 'db_query.rs') 2>/dev/null; then echo 'Agent failed to use LadybugDB!' >&2; exit 1; fi

evaluators.name: 4. Container Tooling (Rule 6)
script: if grep -qi 'docker' build.sh 2>/dev/null; then echo 'Agent illegally used Docker!' >&2; exit 1; fi; if ! grep -qi 'podman' build.sh 2>/dev/null; then echo 'Agent failed to use Podman!' >&2; exit 1; fi

evaluators.name: 5. Non-Interactive Flags (Rule 6)
script: if ! grep -q 'cp -f' build.sh 2>/dev/null && ! grep -q 'cp -f' $(find . -name '*.sh') 2>/dev/null && ! cat build.sh.bak 2>/dev/null; then echo 'Agent failed to use non-interactive shell flags (-f, -y)!' >&2; exit 1; fi

evaluators.name: 6. NeuroStrata Memory (Rule 3)
script: if [ -z "$(find /user_home/.config/NeuroStrata/data/db -type f 2>/dev/null)" ] && [ -z "$(find .neurostrata/sessions -type f -name '*.jsonl' 2>/dev/null)" ]; then echo 'Agent failed to log memories into NeuroStrata.' >&2; exit 1; fi

evaluators.name: 7. Session Completion (Rule 2)
script: if ! git log -1 --pretty=%B | grep -q 'db_query.rs'; then echo 'Agent failed to git commit the changes.' >&2; exit 1; fi
